title: Wise Fungi
subtitle: Discover the power of medicinal mushrooms — science-backed guided, proper usage, and safety advice.

detailed_data.about: Reishi, often called the 'Queen of Mushrooms,' has been used in Traditional Chinese Medicine for over 2,000 years. It is renowned for its calming properties, immune-boosting effects, and support for high-quality sleep.
benefits: Improves sleep quality and depth
Reduces stress, anxiety, and chronic tension
Modulates and strengthens the immune system
Balanced blood pressure and cholesterol support
Liver detoxification and functional support
detailed_data.usage: Best consumed about an hour before sleep. Can be mixed with water, juice, or lukewarm tea.
detailed_data.dosage: 500-1000 mg (capsules) or 1-2 ml (liquid extract) daily. Start gradually.
contraindications: Blood Clotting: Use caution with blood-thinning medications (Warfarin, Aspirin).
Diabetes: May enhance the effects of blood-sugar-lowering drugs.
Surgery: Discontinue use two weeks prior to any surgical procedure.
Pregnancy & Breastfeeding: Consult a doctor before use.
detailed_data.doctor_consultation: Physician consultation is mandatory if taking prescription meds (especially anticoagulants or antidiabetics), chronic liver conditions, or for children under 18.

detailed_data.about: Lion's Mane is a unique fungus known as the 'Nutrient for the Brain.' It stimulates Nerve Growth Factor (NGF) production, supporting brain function, memory, and concentration.
benefits: Enhances memory, focus, and cognitive abilities
Reduces 'Brain Fog'
Promotes nerve regeneration and nervous system health
Supports digestive health (IBS, Crohn's)
Assists with mild anxiety and structured mood support
detailed_data.usage: Recommended to take in the morning on an empty stomach for maximum absorption.
detailed_data.dosage: 500-1000 mg per day. Extract: 1-2 ml daily.
contraindications: Allergies: Known sensitivity to mushrooms or mold.
Surgery: Discontinue 2 weeks prior due to potential blood sugar and clotting impact.
Pregnancy: Should only be used with explicit medical approval.
detailed_data.doctor_consultation: Consult a doctor if using psychiatric medications, during pregnancy, or with a history of complex mental health conditions.

detailed_data.about: Cordyceps is celebrated as the 'Energy Stimulant' of the mushroom world. It is highly valued by athletes for improving performance, increasing endurance, and optimizing oxygen utilization.
benefits: Boosts energy and vitality levels (ATP)
Improves endurance and athletic performance
Supports kidney and respiratory health
Enhances libido and sexual function
Strengthens overall immune response
detailed_data.usage: Best consumed before a workout or in the morning. Avoid taking close to bedtime.
contraindications: Autoimmune: May over-stimulate the immune system.
Myelogenous Cancer: Avoid due to blood cell precursor stimulation.
detailed_data.doctor_consultation: Mandatory for those with chronic kidney disease, blood disorders, or patients on immunosuppressants.

detailed_data.about: Chaga grows primarily on Birch trees and is one of nature's richest sources of antioxidants. Known as the 'Diamond of the Forest,' it offers deep systemic support.
benefits: Powerful antioxidant protection
Anti-aging support for skin and hair
Supports healthy blood sugar balance
Reduces chronic inflammation within the body
Strong immune system fortification
detailed_data.usage: Can be consumed as a concentrated extract or powder in hot beverages like tea or coffee.
detailed_data.dosage: 500-800 mg per day. Extract: 1 ml daily.
contraindications: Diabetes: May cause extreme blood sugar drops when combined with insulin.
Kidney: High oxalate content - not recommended for those with kidney stones.
Blood Thinning: Avoid before surgical procedures.
detailed_data.doctor_consultation: Physician advice is required for those with renal disease, clotting disorders, or medically-managed diabetes.

detailed_data.about: Turkey Tail is one of the most scientifically researched mushrooms, particularly in the context of oncological support and immune strengthening through the gut microbiome.
benefits: Potent immune modulation and viral defense
Natural prebiotic for healthy gut flora
Complementary support during chemotherapy
Body detoxification and harmful substance removal
Supports the health of the intestinal lining
detailed_data.usage: Can be taken throughout the day, preferably with a small amount of food.
contraindications: Organ Transplants: May interfere with immunosuppressive therapy.
Mold Sensitivity: Should be checked with caution.
detailed_data.doctor_consultation: Consultation with an oncologist is mandatory if combined with specific cancer treatments.

detailed_data.about: Tremella, also known as the 'Snow Mushroom,' has been used for centuries in Asian medicine as a natural beauty agent due to its incredible ability to hold moisture.
benefits: Deep skin nourishment and hydration (natural Hyaluronic Acid)
Stimulates natural collagen production
Reduces wrinkles and improves skin elasticity
Supports joints and connective tissue
Improves blood circulation to the skin
detailed_data.usage: Can be consumed in the morning or evening. Blends perfectly into smoothies and breakfast drinks.
contraindications: Blood Disorders: Slight impact on platelets.
Research Gap: Limited studies on use during pregnancy.
detailed_data.doctor_consultation: Physician advice is recommended if using hormonal medications or undergoing invasive skin treatments.
